claims.statement: Great Barrier Reef length is smaller than Appalachian Trail length.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Great Barrier Reef length: 2300 km. Appalachian Trail length: 3500 km.

claims.statement: Category 5 hurricane threshold is slower than Speed of sound in air (~20°C).
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Category 5 hurricane threshold: 252 km/h. Speed of sound in air (~20°C): 1235 km/h.

claims.statement: Appalachian Trail length is at least 8× longer than Panama Canal length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Appalachian Trail length: 3500 km. Panama Canal length: 82 km.

claims.statement: There are more keys on a standard piano than strings on a violin.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 88 keys vs 4 strings.

claims.statement: Penicillin discovered happened after World Wide Web proposed.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. Penicillin discovered: 1928. World Wide Web proposed: 1989.
